programme.title: Entre Nous[Live]
programme.desc: Entre Nous is a France 24 program that brings together in-depth discussions and interviews with experts, cultural figures, and influencers. The show explores current social, political, and cultural topics, offering viewers insightful perspectives and thoughtful analysis on issues shaping the world today.

programme.title: Eye On Africa[Live]
programme.desc: Join Georja Calvin-Smith for all the news from Africa and the Maghreb, together with France 24's correspondents and guests of the show. Eye on Africa is on every week day twice a day. Have a look at African life and find out what is going on there in the sphere of politics, health care, business. Get to know how global affairs influence its top events and be the first to experience its colorful exotic culture.

programme.title: Focus
programme.desc: Keep up with the latest news from all over the globe with Focus on France 24. Focus programme provides exclusive reports from Monday to Friday at 7.50 am Paris time. Find out what's going on in the world of economy, politics, culture, sport, medicine, ecology. Focus has it all covered for you. Short videos contain facts, interviews with real people, numbers, statistics, everything you need to be aware of recent events in the world and of what is actually going on.

Find out what's going on in the world of economy, politics, culture, sport, medicine, ecology. Focus has it all covered for you. Short videos contain facts, interviews with real people, numbers, statistics, everything you need to be aware of recent events in the world and of what is actually going on.

programme.title: Eye On Africa[Live]
programme.desc: Join Georja Calvin-Smith for all the news from Africa and the Maghreb, together with France 24's correspondents and guests of the show. Eye on Africa is on every week day twice a day. Have a look at African life and find out what is going on there in the sphere of politics, health care, business. Get to know how global affairs influence its top events and be the first to experience its colorful exotic culture.

Find out what's going on in the world of economy, politics, culture, sport, medicine, ecology. Focus has it all covered for you. Short videos contain facts, interviews with real people, numbers, statistics, everything you need to be aware of recent events in the world and of what is actually going on.

Phoenix Intercontinental Express is a current affairs program airing at midnight that brings people news from Greater China and around the world.
PHOENIX MIDDAY EXPRESS: Presenting the most update international and financial news breaking before lunch, viewers can turn it to stay informed about events happening around the world.

programme.title: E468
programme.desc: CULTURAL CANVAS: This refreshing cultural program shares with you the wisdom of life, extracting the truth from social events and casting new lights on the high minds of ancient sages.
PHOENIX EVENING EXPRESS: Phoenix Evening Express reports world events with in-depth coverage of the latest social, economic, cultural and sports news from Mainland China, Taiwan and Hong Kong.

programme.title: Premium Spectacular
programme.desc: Premium Spectacular offers Phoenix's finest documentaries in our weekend prime time slot. Each episode comes relevant to the latest news that hits the headlines. Themes range from hot current affair issues at home and abroad, to diverse topics of social, historical and cultural interests.

programme.desc: The 114th drama serial follows two women, Rin (Mikami Ai) and Naomi (Kosaka Juri), who paved the way for nursing in the Meiji era. Each carries her own struggles, yet together they support one another as they race to protect the wounded and vulnerable, often standing up against powerful forces. programme.title: Rokkaku Seiji's Nomitetsu Railroad Trip: Sangi Railway, Kintetsu Railway & Yokkaichi Asunarou Railway
programme.desc: Actor Rokkaku Seiji, a lover of both trains and good drinks, sets out on a rail journey around the world. At each stop, he wanders through the towns and explores whatever catches his eye. Sit back and enjoy this fun-filled railroad trip, accompanied by the music he personally selects!

programme.title: Solo Trip To Hot Springs 'Hokkaido'
programme.desc: Even if you were able to travel, it would often be a rushed trip with limited time... For you, this program is like a solo trip to hot spring resorts, allowing you to fully relax and experience the best of destinations!

programme.title: Tokoro-San's Pursuit Of Truth
programme.desc: An informational program that reveals Japan as it is by following incidents posted on local media such as local newspapers and business presses.

programme.title: Project X: The Challengers-New Beginnings 'The Grounding Of Kaiwomaru'
programme.desc: Project X returns for the first time in 18 years. The former series featured people involved in project related to the Japanese industry and contemporary history. The new series focuses on people in the “Lost Era” following the collapse of the bubble economy. In every era, there are always those take on challenges. Even without receiving praise or being in the spotlight, some dedicate themselves to their work. The documentary delivers passion and courage right to you.

programme.title: E14 - Slammed Datsun
programme.desc: How do you stand out at a show? Build something no one else has. That's why Fuller and Bumpus take a '70s Datsun truck.

programme.title: E11 - Turbocharged, Fuel Injected, Five-Speed...minivan?!
programme.desc: Tony and Lucky stray way off the beaten path with a 1990 Plymouth Voyager five-speed, turbocharged minivan!

programme.title: E7 - The Pickup With Pickup
programme.desc: Noah has a new client who wants to take a 1953 Ford F-100 from a farmland hauler to the racer! What starts as a rust bucket truck on its last legs gets an epic overhaul.

programme.title: E3 - King Of The Hammers
programme.desc: Aaron Kaufman and team barely make it to King of the Hammers in California, where they will put their '71 International Scout to the test of rock and desert racing.

programme.title: E3 - The Beast
programme.desc: As devastating snowstorm blocks Alaska's lifeline, Danny and Animal to bring out the Beast, a 67 ton snowplow- and race to clear the way for a freight train.

programme.title: Challenges
programme.desc: The Junior Vets are halfway through their time at Vet School. And the animal care challenges keep coming. Will and Saira are facing a massive challenge as they try to figure out what is wrong with Caspar, the Boxer dog.

programme.title: Super Sub Adventure
programme.desc: Darwin and Newts turn their waka into an underwater submarine to have fun with their dolphin friend Opo.

programme.title: Dolphin
programme.desc: Today Kristina has to perform an ultrasound on Ulysses, the dolphin's, eye. But can she train Ulysses to keep her eye open long enough to perform the vital test? Meet also Garoe, a one-year-old chimp and Dali, the emperor tamarin, who has an age-old problem.

programme.title: Orca Baby
programme.desc: Morgan, the deaf orca, is about to give birth to her very first calf. The stakes are high, and the staff at Loro Parque are holding their collective breath as the scene is set for the greatest natural phenomenon in the zoo's history.

programme.title: Neurons, Neurons, Neurons!
programme.desc: Eric learns that neurons are the brain's tiny building blocks. He does an experiment to show what they are and how they work. He is surprised to learn that giraffes have neurons that are five metres long.

programme.title: Spectroscopes and Light
programme.desc: What do atmospheric particles do in the sky? A puzzling question lands you in the wondrous world of radiation. Have hands-on fun by creating a weather system in a jar, and get to know C.V. Raman, a physicist, who discovered that scattered light can change wavelength.

programme.title: Keyboard
programme.desc: Creativity has no limits, watch Hepi and Briko transform the keyboard to something impressive!

programme.title: A Day in the Life of Jorge
programme.desc: As Loro Parque's head vet, Jorge never knows from one day to the next what will come through his clinic. Javier, Loro Parque's Head of Environmental Affairs, is hitting the high seas of Tenerife with a turtle tracker in hand to help with scientific research.

programme.title: Medical MacGyver
programme.desc: Host Alie Ward presents a Medical MacGyver who makes health devices from toys, an inventor with dozens of inventions, including the Pocket Fisherman, kids learning computer code in school, and a 3D Printing Pen.

programme.title: The Proteus Factor
programme.desc: Proteus traps the Aronnax in a magnetic field and kidnaps Ant, believing he is the key to finding Lemuria.

programme.title: Jesters
programme.desc: Lord Roach is feeling really down! His wife Geraldine goes out of her way to entertain him, bringing in acrobats, musicians, etc. But it's no good. Enter Little Lewis, dressed in his court jester costume and Lord Roach is very happy.

programme.title: Flower Power
programme.desc: Albert eats a flower that gives him super powers, and he uses them to take revenge on the kids who have tormented him throughout his life. But with great power comes great irresponsibility...

programme.title: The Ouch! Awards 4
programme.desc: The Ouch Taxi is on the road once again as the doctors celebrate the outstanding, unbelievable, caring, and heroic achievements of this year's finalists and reveal the winners.

programme.title: Spinning Seeds
programme.desc: Eric learns that plants have different ways to make their seeds fly as far away as possible. He makes his own version of the maple seed, which looks like a little paper helicopter.

programme.title: Time to Talk
programme.desc: Acro gymnast George has had enough of people misunderstanding his sport, and he is giving his classmates a presentation to let them know what it's like to be a world-class acrobatic gymnast. And Corey returns home from the World Championships in Russia.

programme.title: The President (F.W. de Klerk) and The Pioneer (Valerie Amos)
programme.desc: In this episode of Bear Grylls' Becoming Xtraordinary, former President of South Africa and Nobel Peace Prize winner President F.W. de Klerk and first Black woman member of the British Government and pioneering British diplomat Valerie Amos share their life lessons.

programme.title: Recipe for Success
programme.desc: Ella and Lauren forget about finding dance partners as they head to an ice show in Brighton to brush shoulders with the stars and see if there's another way for them to follow a skating career. And our Ice Stars meet head to head in a baking challenge.

programme.title: A Nut For a Jar of Tuna
programme.desc: A palindrome is a word, sentence or verse that reads the same backward as forward. Examples are RACECAR and KAYAK. In this episode we demonstrate how numbers can be converted into palindromes as well.

programme.title: Eye Popping
programme.desc: In this episode, the kitchen lab has been turned upside down as Dr. Xand gives the optic nerves of the world the day off. And find out how to make your own eye-popping, brain-teasing game.

programme.title: Double Emergency
programme.desc: There's a double emergency at the Vet School. Edward, the ferret, is seriously ill, having stopped eating, and a sick cow with a mystery illness needs investigating. Can the Junior Vets cope when things go wrong?

programme.title: A Day in the Life of Jorge
programme.desc: As Loro Parque's head vet, Jorge never knows from one day to the next what will come through his clinic. Javier, Loro Parque's Head of Environmental Affairs, is hitting the high seas of Tenerife with a turtle tracker in hand to help with scientific research.

programme.title: The President (F.W. de Klerk) and The Pioneer (Valerie Amos)
programme.desc: In this episode of Bear Grylls' Becoming Xtraordinary, former President of South Africa and Nobel Peace Prize winner President F.W. de Klerk and first Black woman member of the British Government and pioneering British diplomat Valerie Amos share their life lessons.

programme.title: E23 - Bad Blood
programme.desc: In a rusty car just outside Lusagne, Alex finds the prostate but alive body of a young man who'd gone missing years earlier. An emotional return for friends and family. But, very quickly, Alex finds the story the young man gives of his kidnap-ping and years of absence somewhat unlikely.

programme.title: Pistes Vertes:2025-2026
programme.desc: In Normandy, people from different backgrounds are committed to the environmental cause. They have one thing in common: they started by applying a few small ecological gestures in their daily lives before going further, until making it their profession.

programme.title: E4 - Storm
programme.desc: Dounia and her grandparents are gradually getting to know Canada, their new country. But for little Dounia, it isn't easy to get used to its seasons, food and language. She misses her father terribly. Fortunately her new friends rally round to help her make progress.

programme.title: E9 - Animals In Danger
programme.desc: The entire empire is on alert: Soundiata Keita's mother has been kidnapped. Abdul, as thirsty for power as ever, heads to the city of the sacred baobab trees.

programme.title: Objectif Monde L'hebdo:2025-2026
programme.desc: Report, inquiry, investigation ... ''Objectif Monde L'Hebdo'', a television magazine by French-speaking editorialists, takes time to reflect and analyse through the expert insights and opinions provided by specialists. A TV5MONDE programme, jointly produced with RTS, in collaboration with its francophone partners (RTBF, Radio-Canada, France Televisions).

programme.title: E85
programme.desc: The magazine programme all about the art of living in Monaco, Provence and on the Cote d'Azur.

programme.title: Generation F S1
programme.desc: Fashion, food, sport, urban culture, lifestyle... The artist Richard Orlinski explores the French touch. Between Dakar, London and Montreal, he meets a new generation of creators and puts the spotlight on a bold and uninhibited French-speaking world.

programme.title: E9
programme.desc: TV5MONDE's new economic news bulletin, presented by Vicky Bogaert. ''Parlons eco'' analyses today's major trends and interviews the men and women who are starting businesses, innovating and imagining the economy of tomorrow.

programme.title: Closing Bell
programme.desc: Anything can happen between the bells of the trading day. But what happens during the last hour could be what matters most. Hosted by CNBC's Scott Wapner, “Closing Bell” guides you through the most important hour of the trading day. programme.title: Closing Bell: Overtime
programme.desc: When the bell rings, the action does not end. “Closing Bell: Overtime” takes you through all of the after-hours moves including breaking news, corporate earnings and post-market trading. programme.title: E2 - Tom Arnold
programme.desc: World-renowned survivalist Bear Grylls takes Tom Arnold (Sons of Anarchy (2008)) through the unpredictable coastal mountains of Oregon, taking on steep terrain, river crossings and oceanside cliffs. programme.desc: The Pig family are going on vacation. Peppa and George pack their favorite toys and Granny and Grandpa are left to look after Goldie the Fish.

programme.title: E208 - Bbarbalalalalalala
programme.desc: Barbalala and the family life!

programme.title: E206 - Talent Show
programme.desc: Tim, Tia & Tommy decide to put on a talent show, but then they can't decide who should go first...

programme.title: E716 - The Outback
programme.desc: Peppa, George, Mummy Pig and Daddy Pig go to visit the Kangaroo family in Australia and get to explore The Outback.

programme.desc: The Barbababies want to invent like Leonardo da Vinci. // The Barbababies must choose between going to the pool or going for a bike ride.

programme.title: E123 - Barba TV / The Museum
programme.desc: The barbababies are glued to the TV. Since they love it so much, their parents encourage them to make their own shows. // The Barbapapa visit the museum of evolution. On the program: creation of the Earth, Precambrian submarine and... dinosaurs!

programme.title: E222 - The Crew Builds A Hotel / The Crew Builds A Hiking Trail
programme.desc: Builder Cove gets its first hotel when Farmer Zoe's cousin Hadley comes to visit. But will Hadley approve of the new hotel?// After a hiking trail mix-up confuses everyone going to Mr. Ducky-Doo's birthday party, the pups help them get back on track.

programme.title: E604 - Pups Save The Honey / Pups Save Mayor Goodway's Purse
programme.desc: Yumi's Yummy Honey is all the buzz when it - and her beehive - go missing from her farm! // Mayor Goodway's purse has disappeared! Along with its precious cargo - Chickaletta!

programme.title: E202 - Super Dad
programme.desc: Tim sets out to prove Kai's Dad is Captain DinoStar.

programme.title: E311 - The Crew Lifts Up City Hall / The Crew Builds A Rotating Restaurant
programme.desc: A herd of bison are migrating through Builder Cove-right toward City Hall! Rubble & Crew hop in their big vehicles to save the day. // The pups use their mega-sized trucks to help Lucas and Lily give their parents the most awesome anniversary ever.

programme.title: E123 - Barba TV / The Museum
programme.desc: The barbababies are glued to the TV. Since they love it so much, their parents encourage them to make their own shows. // The Barbapapa visit the museum of evolution. On the program: creation of the Earth, Precambrian submarine and... dinosaurs!

programme.title: E624 - The Fish Pond
programme.desc: Daddy Pig takes Peppa and George to see a fish pond he used to visit when he was a little piggy. He is a little surprised to learn that a few things have changed since then.

programme.title: E610 - Pups Save A Manatee
programme.desc: Farmer Al and Farmer Yumi need help from the PAW Patrol to a get a manatee to the swamp.

programme.title: E211 - The Crew Builds Mr. Ducky-Doo A Special Diving Board / The Crew Builds A Ra
programme.desc: Mayor Greatway asks Rubble & Crew to build something special for her friend Mr. Ducky-Doo. But soon a construction mystery is afoot... // Rubble & Crew work to build a rain tank for Farmer Zoe before a storm, until a chicken complication crops up.

programme.title: E6
programme.desc: 程家女名少商，因戰亂自幼被父母留在祖母身邊成為“留守兒童”，嬸孃狼心縱容，意圖將其養成廢人。面對重重陷阱，程少商（趙露思飾）為活命，假荒誕、真苦學，掩蓋鋒芒等待父母歸來。可撥開烏雲見月明時，卻因多年疏離致使親情已難再拾。缺愛的程少商，遇新帝義子凌不疑（吳磊飾）、白鹿山才子袁慎、世家子弟樓垚，三人各有優劣。在選擇適婚者上，程少商既自卑又務實，儘管情感之路頗多坎坷，但她從不後悔自己的每次選擇。在與凌不疑的相處之中，也陰差陽錯捲入了凌不疑的家庭與身世之謎中。種種事件，程少商屢立奇功，也從凌不疑的家庭關係中學會與父母相處之道，以及如何經營自己的愛情。同時程少商與凌不疑也在這些經歷中各自變化成長，慢慢與自己和家庭和解，並堅守內心的正義，攜手化解國家危機，成就一段佳話。

programme.title: E6
programme.desc: 侯文詠原著小說改編，兩段糾結的情感，交織出一場關於「選擇」的情愛旅程。

programme.title: E1
programme.desc: 《祝卿好》改編自伊人睽睽的小説《我的錦衣衞大人》，講述了刁蠻嬌憨又霸道的長樂郡主劉泠偶遇武功高強的冷峻金麟衞沈宴，展開花式追逐的故事。

programme.desc: 侯文詠原著小說改編，兩段糾結的情感，交織出一場關於「選擇」的情愛旅程。

programme.title: E19
programme.desc: 《愛很美味》講述了三位個性迥異、特色鮮明的都市麗人，在經歷了一系列創業的艱辛，職場的壓迫，和感情的波折後，對生活、事業和愛情都有了重新的認識。

programme.title: Encantadia Chronicles: Sang'gre
programme.desc: The series is a spin-off to the Philippine television fantasy drama series, Encantadia.

programme.title: Never Say Die
programme.desc: Never Say Die follows Joey Delgado (Jillian Ward), a principled IT student who runs a vlog spotlighting the quiet heroism of honest police officers-inspired by her father, Major Julio Delgado (Raymart Santiago). Her views are challenged when a viral expose by Andrew Dizon (David Licauco), a sharp and cynical investigative vlogger, paints her father as corrupt and gets him suspended. The expose shatters the home she so carefully nurtured and blames Andrew.

programme.title: E6 - For Your Eyes Only
programme.desc: While listening to a radio talk show, ALF becomes interested in Jody, a young blind lady who is having a difficult time making friends. Feeling that they have much in common, he decides to meet her in person.

programme.title: E7 - Help Me Rhonda
programme.desc: When ALF suffers serious homesickness, the girl of ALF's dreams, Willie tries to make contact with other Melmacians. But when ALF gets a chance to leave Earth, he must decide if he really wants to go.

programme.title: E2 - Murder in Mesopotamia (Part 2)
programme.desc: Poirot's rehabilitative health retreat on an island resort becomes an even more stimulating mental exercise when a flirtatious film star is found strangled on a nearby beach.

programme.title: E5 - The Execution
programme.desc: To stop a brutal racketeer from controlling the American grocery industry, the IMF must convince his hitman to turn coat.

programme.title: E18 - Samantha's Secret Is Discovered
programme.desc: Samantha saves her 'secret' and Mrs. Stephens sanity by some well placed witchcraft.

programme.title: E19 - Tabitha's Very Own Samantha
programme.desc: Samantha teaches Tabitha an important lesson and Tabitha realizes that one mother is enough.

programme.title: E11 - The Abdication
programme.desc: John-Boy Walton shares an inner bond with Edward the Eighth, King of England, when he faces the most important professional and personal decision of his life.

programme.title: E12 - The Estrangement
programme.desc: A frightened, young mother seeks refuge in the Walton home when she leaves her husband.

programme.title: Why Poet Rainer Maria Rilke Still Hits So Hard Today
programme.desc: Rilke is treated almost like a pop star on social media, and his poetry has the makings of a hit: the poet Rainer Maria Rilke is, even more than 150 years after his birth, a cult figure. Young influencers interpret his poetry, and Lady Gaga's upper arm is adorned with a tattooed Rilke verse. He appears on calendars and even funeral notices.

programme.title: From Surplus Calf To Alpine Savior
programme.desc: For a cow to produce milk, she must give birth to a calf. Female calves later become dairy cows themselves, while male calves are surplus to the dairy industry's requirements. They're packed into trucks and suffer in transit on their way to fattening facilities.

programme.title: Why Poet Rainer Maria Rilke Still Hits So Hard Today
programme.desc: Rilke is treated almost like a pop star on social media, and his poetry has the makings of a hit: the poet Rainer Maria Rilke is, even more than 150 years after his birth, a cult figure. Young influencers interpret his poetry, and Lady Gaga's upper arm is adorned with a tattooed Rilke verse. He appears on calendars and even funeral notices.

programme.title: Former Miss South Africa Shudufhadzo Musida Opens Up On Mental Health Issue
programme.desc: Did you know that former Miss South Africa Shudufhadzo Musida only entered the competition to fulfill a promise to a friend? For our season finale, host Nozibele Qamngana Mayaba quizzes Shudufhadzo on how getting a grip on her mental health literally helped her achieve her potential.

programme.title: Why Poet Rainer Maria Rilke Still Hits So Hard Today
programme.desc: Rilke is treated almost like a pop star on social media, and his poetry has the makings of a hit: the poet Rainer Maria Rilke is, even more than 150 years after his birth, a cult figure. Young influencers interpret his poetry, and Lady Gaga's upper arm is adorned with a tattooed Rilke verse. He appears on calendars and even funeral notices.

programme.title: Santiago De Compostela
programme.desc: The Way of St. James is actually a network of paths made up of several hiking trails across Europe. They all have the city of Santiago de Compostela in Spain as their final destination. We ask pilgrims about their motivation and feelings, find out why Santiago is the destination of the Way of St. James and how the city deals with the flood of pilgrims and hikers in the high season.

programme.title: Why Poet Rainer Maria Rilke Still Hits So Hard Today
programme.desc: Rilke is treated almost like a pop star on social media, and his poetry has the makings of a hit: the poet Rainer Maria Rilke is, even more than 150 years after his birth, a cult figure. programme.title: How The Martial Art Khomlainai Brings Bodo And Santhal Communities Together
programme.desc: In Assam, decades of conflict kept Bodo and Santhal communities apart. Now the traditional martial art Khomlainai is bringing children together, who have never spoken or played with each other before. Mejing Narzary, a former Bodo underground fighter, and Khermu Karmakar, a former general of the Santhal insurgent force, have achieved this miracle.

programme.title: How The Martial Art Khomlainai Brings Bodo And Santhal Communities Together
programme.desc: In Assam, decades of conflict kept Bodo and Santhal communities apart. Now the traditional martial art Khomlainai is bringing children together, who have never spoken or played with each other before. Mejing Narzary, a former Bodo underground fighter, and Khermu Karmakar, a former general of the Santhal insurgent force, have achieved this miracle.

programme.title: Why Poet Rainer Maria Rilke Still Hits So Hard Today
programme.desc: Rilke is treated almost like a pop star on social media, and his poetry has the makings of a hit: the poet Rainer Maria Rilke is, even more than 150 years after his birth, a cult figure. Young influencers interpret his poetry, and Lady Gaga's upper arm is adorned with a tattooed Rilke verse. He appears on calendars and even funeral notices.

programme.title: E332 - Choco-Coco/Parasailing Fishing/Yummy Pirates/Sea Excursion/Sand Lemmings/Non-Peaceful
programme.desc: Grizzy wakes up after a nap, starving, but the last jar of Yummy chocolate spread is empty. The cupboards are barren, except for a package of chocolate powder.

programme.title: E150 - The Candidate/The Anybody
programme.desc: When their parents all go to a charity gala at the school, the kids are locked in a classroom with a VHS tape. However, when the room starts to heat up, they need a leader to get them out of the situation and have to choose between Anais, a qualified but unpopular candidate or Gumball, a charismatic candidate with absolutely no plans.

programme.title: Tweety's High-Flying Adventure -Tweety's High-Flying Adventure
programme.desc: Everyone's favorite little yellow bird takes a madcap trip around the world when Granny wagers that Tweety can circle the globe in 80 days and collect no fewer than 80 cat paw prints along the way.

programme.title: E69 - The Sale/The Routine/The Parking/The Upgrade/The Comic
programme.desc: Gumball and Darwin are devastated to learn that Mr Robinson - their favourite person in the world - is selling his house and leaving town. When they realise that making some final happy memories with Mr Robinson is not enough for them, they decide to stop him leaving, by sabotaging the sale.

programme.title: E275 - The Wild Hunt/Always Bmo Closing/Son Of Rap Bear/Bonnibel Bubblegum/Seventeen
programme.desc: A fierce creature is terrorizing the Candy Kingdom but before Finn can slay the beast, he must first overcome a guilty conscience.

programme.desc: Connie helps look after Beach City while Steven is busy.

programme.title: How To Train Your Dragon
programme.desc: The beloved animated franchise about the remarkable friendship between a young Viking boy named Hiccup and Toothless.

programme.title: E2 - Bourbon, Barrels And Burgoo
programme.desc: A very pregnant Gail Simmons asks the chefs to feed her cravings in a special Quickfire delivery. Then it’s time to celebrate two iconic Kentucky mainstays: local cuisine and bourbon. The Chefs head to Makers Mark, the oldest distillery in America to put their spins on a meal full of Kentucky classics including burgoo, Benedictine, mutton, hoe cakes and dumplings. This is a true battle for Kentucky as the chefs navigate their first team challenge – and one chef makes a potentially fatal shopping error. Can they recover or will they be scraping the bottom of the barrel to make it through? Food and travel editor, Nilou Motamed joins the judges this season, and Maker’s Mark’s in-house Chef, Newman Miller, sits on the panel as a guest judge.

programme.desc: After a man is shot dead, pathologist Dr. Antoine Wrice works with investigators to interpret unusual evidence found on the scene and unwind the complex case that could be more than a typical homicide.

E3 - Eat Or Be Eaten
programme.desc: Go up against predatory insects that are tailor-made for killing. See why the terrifying praying mantis has the agility of a martial artist and an appetite for everything from flies to hummingbirds, then go hunting in mid-air with deadly dragonflies.

programme.title: E3 - Invisible Signals
programme.desc: Could undiscovered animal languages save some of our most endangered species? From subtle scents to colors that are invisible to the human eye, uncover the hidden ways creatures communicate, which scientists are only starting to understand.

programme.title: E6 - Cook Islands/ Kūki 'Airani
programme.desc: Travel to the Cook Islands, the destination of choice for 3,000 humpback whales ready to mate and raise their young. Witness giant clams and green turtles thriving in the islands’ massive coral reef and get a glimpse into our evolutionary past.

programme.title: E3 - Eat Or Be Eaten
programme.desc: Go up against predatory insects that are tailor-made for killing. See why the terrifying praying mantis has the agility of a martial artist and an appetite for everything from flies to hummingbirds, then go hunting in mid-air with deadly dragonflies.

programme.title: E6 - Amazon Monkeys
programme.desc: Get an inside look at the Pantanal’s most extraordinary primate families. Check out the ear-splitting cries of howler monkeys, the fearless leaps of curious saki monkeys, and the agile tails of highly intelligent white-whiskered spider monkeys.

programme.title: E6 - To the Rescue
programme.desc: Meet more Amazing Animal Friends, including “ranch manager” Barclay, a Great Dane who happens to be a gifted horse whisperer. In Africa, a tiny marmoset called Thor has become obsessed with two young rescued mongooses.

programme.title: E3 - Invisible Signals
programme.desc: Could undiscovered animal languages save some of our most endangered species? From subtle scents to colors that are invisible to the human eye, uncover the hidden ways creatures communicate, which scientists are only starting to understand.

programme.title: E3 - A New Zealand Christmas
programme.desc: See how one animal family’s tragedy is another’s holiday dinner as New Zealand’s mainland and island creatures, including penguins, flightless birds, sea lions, and sharks, battle to feed and protect their young in this marine environment.

programme.title: E5 - Pacific Islands: Commotion in the Ocean
programme.desc: Live through a sunny tropical September day with creatures from Polynesia to the Indonesian archipelago. See how the sun affects the movement, feeding habits, and mating rituals of everything from tiny zooplankton to whale sharks.

programme.title: E3 - A New Zealand Christmas
programme.desc: See how one animal family’s tragedy is another’s holiday dinner as New Zealand’s mainland and island creatures, including penguins, flightless birds, sea lions, and sharks, battle to feed and protect their young in this marine environment.

programme.title: E1 - The Outcasts
programme.desc: In the Luangwa Valley lies a grove of Ebony trees, home to a troop of baboons. But, there are dangers here – the resident leopard who, unlike the other predators, is powerful and agile enough to climb trees. He’s not an easy foe to elude.

programme.desc: See how one animal family’s tragedy is another’s holiday dinner as New Zealand’s mainland and island creatures, including penguins, flightless birds, sea lions, and sharks, battle to feed and protect their young in this marine environment.

programme.title: E5 - Pacific Islands: Commotion in the Ocean
programme.desc: Live through a sunny tropical September day with creatures from Polynesia to the Indonesian archipelago. See how the sun affects the movement, feeding habits, and mating rituals of everything from tiny zooplankton to whale sharks.

programme.title: E1 - The Outcasts

programme.title: E6 - The Return
programme.desc: For well over a century the remains of Yagan, an Indigenous Noongar warrior from WA, were missing in the UK. The search for Yagan and the fight to bring him home is one of history's wildest detective stories. (Final)

programme.title: E8 - The Leyland Brother - Mal Leyland
programme.desc: In the 1960s and 70s, Mal Leyland was one of the best-known people on TV, as one half of the Leyland Brothers. Now at age 81, the pioneer of outback documentaries is suffering dementia - but still planning one last trip.

programme.title: E72
programme.desc: More news, more often. Wherever you are stay in touch with ABC News. We've got more reporters in more places, connecting communities and covering the stories and issues that matter to you. Presented by Jade Barker.

programme.title: Goin' Bulilit S15[Live]
programme.desc: A gag show with child actors playing adult roles, doing gags, sketches and segments. Instead of playing roles based on their own age, child actors are made to portray adult characters like Doctors, Teachers, Married Couples, etc.

programme.title: Lavender Fields
programme.desc: Jasmin Flores lives a peaceful life in her mountain hometown until she falls for Arthur Pelaez, a man hiding dark secrets. Arthur is tied to a powerful gun cartel and trapped in a marriage to Iris Buenavidez. When Arthur becomes a target over stolen money, Jasmin loses everything and reinvents herself as Lavender Fields, seeking revenge against those who destroyed her life. The series blends romance, betrayal, and vengeance in a high-stakes world of crime and family power struggles.

programme.title: Darna
programme.desc: Narda, a typical schoolgirl, learns that her mother is the protector of a mighty stone. She takes up the mantle and transforms into Darna, a superhero dedicated to battling evil forces on Earth.

programme.desc: The show highlights the personal journeys, challenges and truimphs of ordinary and extraordinary overseas Filipinos. Produced and hosted by Rose Eclarinal

programme.title: E1 - A Day in the Life of JJ & Friends!
programme.desc: Spend a fun-filled day in the life of JJ & his friends! First, Ms. Appleberry takes the Melon Patch kids on a beach field trip to learn about different types of vehicles. Then, JJ gets to bring a special guest to class: his dog, Bingo! Everyone has a great time as Bingo plays, snacks & even saves the day! The adventure continues at the farm, where JJ & Grandpa have to wrangle all the baby animals after they escape from their pen!

programme.title: Secrets In The Desert
programme.desc: A romantic road trip turns into a woman's desperate search for answers when the car she and her boyfriend are driving breaks down in a creepy backwater town. Then the boyfriend vanishes.

programme.title: Secrets In The Desert
programme.desc: A romantic road trip turns into a woman's desperate search for answers when the car she and her boyfriend are driving breaks down in a creepy backwater town. Then the boyfriend vanishes.

programme.title: E30 - Crispy Cod And All'aglione
programme.desc: Rachael shows how to make bacalao con pomodoro, a dish inspired by an amazing meal she shared with husband John during a special trip to Elba, a Mediterranean island in Tuscany.

programme.title: E5 - Flight Or Fight
programme.desc: Bystanders, police, and airport staff attempt to take down an aggressive man at a Singaporean airport. Fellow passengers rush to help when an expectant mother goes into labor mid-flight.

programme.title: Secrets In The Desert
programme.desc: A romantic road trip turns into a woman's desperate search for answers when the car she and her boyfriend are driving breaks down in a creepy backwater town. Then the boyfriend vanishes.

programme.title: E15 - Cajun Chicken Confit With Pickled Fennel
programme.desc: Chef Deborah prepares her Southern-style chicken confit by seasoning the chicken, adding vegetables and herbs, and slow-cooking it in oil. She finishes the dish with pickled fennel and “dirty pasta”.

programme.title: E15 - Cajun Chicken Confit With Pickled Fennel
programme.desc: Chef Deborah prepares her Southern-style chicken confit by seasoning the chicken, adding vegetables and herbs, and slow-cooking it in oil. She finishes the dish with pickled fennel and “dirty pasta”.

programme.title: E11 - 五強集結完成
programme.desc: 由周杰倫擔當音樂造夢者，召集夢想生活官劉畊宏和夢想見證官王鶴棣，及四組廠牌經理人GAI周延&布瑞吉Bridge、歐陽靖&小鬼王琳凱、艾熱&早安、VaVa&盛宇，一同為說唱新生代們的追夢之旅保駕護航；打破傳統導師帶隊模式，通過構建真實師徒關系，共同打造獨具特色的說唱廠牌；透過競演激發說唱歌手創作才華，在全民中尋找下一個說唱巨星。

programme.title: E9 - 男女對唱演繹愛的訣別
programme.desc: 首檔原創音樂創演節目，邀請了薛之謙、張靚穎、周深、單依純、黃子弘凡等歌手，同時更邀請小柯、方文山、黃國倫等樂壇前輩和眾多新生代原創音樂人加盟；由歌曲爭奪戰、首演舞台兩大核心環節組成，用一場歌手與歌曲的奇遇，為他們提供一個自由共創的舞台，打造華語樂壇新的高光時刻。

programme.title: E15 - 喜迎收官 出發團合唱
programme.desc: 出發團老成員沈騰、白敬亭、金晨、賈冰、胡先煦、王安宇、范丞丞攜手再次奔赴自然秘境，沉浸式領略各地的美麗風景；以「金木水火土」為主題線索，踏上野外探險之旅，將旅行與挑戰深度綁定，足跡從西藏林芝、齊齊哈爾等國內秘境延伸至海外極端環境。

programme.title: E15 - 喜迎收官 出發團合唱
programme.desc: 出發團老成員沈騰、白敬亭、金晨、賈冰、胡先煦、王安宇、范丞丞攜手再次奔赴自然秘境，沉浸式領略各地的美麗風景；以「金木水火土」為主題線索，踏上野外探險之旅，將旅行與挑戰深度綁定，足跡從西藏林芝、齊齊哈爾等國內秘境延伸至海外極端環境。

programme.title: E11 - 五強集結完成
programme.desc: 由周杰倫擔當音樂造夢者，召集夢想生活官劉畊宏和夢想見證官王鶴棣，及四組廠牌經理人GAI周延&布瑞吉Bridge、歐陽靖&小鬼王琳凱、艾熱&早安、VaVa&盛宇，一同為說唱新生代們的追夢之旅保駕護航；打破傳統導師帶隊模式，通過構建真實師徒關系，共同打造獨具特色的說唱廠牌；透過競演激發說唱歌手創作才華，在全民中尋找下一個說唱巨星。

programme.title: Framed By My Sister
programme.desc: The families of twin sisters are “infiltrated” by a mysterious triplet, who was separated from them at birth by their adopted mother. She frames one of the twins for murdering the other's husband and then assumes the identity of the widow. Can she succeed?

Just Married
programme.desc: Chi-Wah and Siu-Suet get married. But Wah's mum feels unhappy about her new daughter-in-law since Siu-Suet does not meet her expectations. She plans to kick Siu-Suet out...

programme.title: Midnight Caller
programme.desc: One night, DJ Zhou Meishi received a phone call from an audience named “hungry wolf”. He told her he hated the world and he would burn down the hospital in which he was born. The next day, a hospital was being set fire on. Then “hungry wolf” called again and declared he would burn down his kindergarten and there followed really an explosion. And according to “hungry wolf”, the next target would be Zhou. Chief Wang was appointed to investigate into the case and to protect Zhou. On the other hand, since Zhou suspected “hungry wolf” to be a luster, she reacted strangely and made a lot of jokes during the course of the investigation...

programme.title: Bandhan (1998)
programme.desc: Unable to bear a child, Pooja is asked to compromise with her husband's new mistress or leave the house. Pooja's brother, Raju, decides to fight for her and reunite her with her husband. Release Year: 1998 Director: N.R. Acharya
